patient_records: 68 y/o F with HTN, Type 2 DM, hyperlipidemia. BP today 148/92. Last A1c 7.2%. Patient reports occasional dizziness on standing. Adherence to current meds is good. Needs comprehensive medication review and BP/glucose monitoring plan.

52 y/o M with rheumatoid arthritis, knee OA, GERD. Starting adalimumab per rheumatology. Screen for TB and hepatitis B completed; negative. Patient educated on infection risk and need for routine labs. Request pharmacist care plan for monitoring and adherence.

59 y/o F with Parkinson disease, depression, insomnia. Recently switched from pramipexole to carbidopa-levodopa due to impulse control concerns. Off periods and dyskinesia reported. Request care plan focusing on dosing timing, fall risk, and drug-disease interactions.
